title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.6
why_it_matters: Sonnet 4.6 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Direct competitor to GPT-5.4 in the fast-model tier.
action: Try Sonnet 4.6 in the API today

title: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro rolling out in ChatGPT and API
why_it_matters: OpenAI unifies reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into one model. GPT-5.4 is now available in the API and Codex, making it immediately usable for developers.
action: Test GPT-5.4 in the API and compare to your current model

title: Anthropic identifies industrial-scale distillation attacks by DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and MiniMax
why_it_matters: 24,000+ fraudulent accounts and 16M+ exchanges used to distill Claude. First major public disclosure of systematic model theft at this scale — raises serious questions about open-weight model provenance.
action: Read the full distillation detection blog post

title: Dario Amodei statement on Anthropic's discussions with the Department of War
why_it_matters: Anthropic's CEO publicly responds to Pentagon supply-chain risk label. The AI-government relationship is defining the competitive landscape — this is a pivotal moment for the industry.
action: Read the full statement for policy implications

title: Claude Code Security: scan codebases for vulnerabilities with AI-suggested patches
why_it_matters: Claude Code now scans codebases for security vulnerabilities and suggests targeted patches for human review. Finds issues that traditional SAST tools miss. Limited research preview.
action: Request access to the research preview

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
why_it_matters: Google's most cost-efficient Gemini 3 model yet. The fast-cheap model tier is now a three-way race between Flash-Lite, Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.3 Instant.
action: Benchmark Flash-Lite costs vs your current cheap model

title: Designing AI-resistant technical evaluations
why_it_matters: Infrastructure configuration can swing agentic coding benchmarks by several percentage points — sometimes more than the gap between top models on leaderboards. Essential reading for anyone building or evaluating AI coding tools.
action: Audit your own eval setup for infrastructure confounds

title: Claude Code Remote Control: kick off terminal tasks, control from your phone
why_it_matters: Start a coding task in your terminal, walk away, and control the session from your phone or claude.ai. This changes the workflow for long-running agentic tasks.
action: Try /remote in Claude Code

title: OpenAI reaches agreement with Department of War to deploy models in classified network
why_it_matters: While Anthropic faces DoW scrutiny, OpenAI secures a classified network deployment deal. The diverging government relationships between the two leading labs is now a major strategic factor.
action: Follow the policy implications for your AI procurement

title: Karpathy: programming has fundamentally changed in the last 2 months
why_it_matters: Karpathy argues coding agents basically didn't work before December and basically work now. Models have significantly higher quality, long-term coherence, and tenacity. A milestone observation from one of the most respected voices in AI.
action: Re-evaluate your agent workflow if you haven't since December

title: Anthropic acquires Vercept to advance Claude's computer use capabilities
why_it_matters: Anthropic is doubling down on computer use with an acqui-hire. Signals that GUI agents are becoming a core product focus, not just a research demo.
action: Watch for computer use improvements in upcoming releases

title: Claude Code introducing /simplify and /batch skills
why_it_matters: /simplify automates shepherding PRs to production quality; /batch handles parallelizable code migrations. Two high-leverage workflow automations for daily coding.
action: Update Claude Code and try /simplify on your next PR

title: Karpathy: Train and inference GPT in 243 lines of pure, dependency-free Python
why_it_matters: The full algorithmic content of GPT training and inference distilled to 243 lines of pure Python. No dependencies. Perfect for understanding what's essential vs. what's optimization.
action: Read and run the code to deepen your LLM understanding

title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
why_it_matters: Google's latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, subject consistency, and production-ready specs at Flash speed. Major upgrade for image gen pipelines.
action: Test Nano Banana 2 for your image generation use cases

title: Karpathy: CLIs are super exciting because AI agents can natively use them
why_it_matters: CLIs are 'legacy' tech that agents can natively interact with via the terminal toolkit. Combine GitHub CLI + Polymarket CLI + an agent and get arbitrary dashboards built for you. Practical insight for agent tool design.
action: Expose your tools as CLIs for agent consumption

title: GLM-5 by ZAI (Zhipu AI)
why_it_matters: Zhipu AI's GLM-5 is trending hard on HuggingFace with 1.7K likes and 210K downloads. A strong new open-weight text generation contender from China's top lab.
action: Download and benchmark against your current open model

title: LLMs work best when the user defines their acceptance criteria first
why_it_matters: High-engagement HN post arguing that LLM code quality jumps when you specify acceptance criteria upfront — essentially TDD for prompting. Practical framework any developer can adopt immediately.
action: Define tests before asking LLMs to write code

title: MiniMax-M2.5 by MiniMaxAI
why_it_matters: MiniMax's latest model trending with 1.1K likes and 354K downloads — notably from one of the labs Anthropic just accused of distillation attacks. The model's provenance is now under scrutiny.
action: Watch for Anthropic's distillation findings impact

title: Perplexity pplx-embed-v1 (0.6B) embedding model
why_it_matters: Perplexity releases their first open embedding model at just 0.6B parameters. Lightweight enough to self-host, backed by Perplexity's search-focused training. A new option for RAG pipelines.
action: Benchmark against your current embedding model

title: LocoOperator-4B: GUI agent model by LocoreMind
why_it_matters: A 4B-parameter open model specifically designed for GUI agent operation. Small enough to run locally, purpose-built for computer use — interesting alternative to large proprietary GUI agents.
action: Try it for local GUI automation tasks
